name: Synthetic Student Response Literature Review
summary: A domain pack for reviewing literature on LLM-generated synthetic student responses, their evaluation, and their use in automated scorer validation research.

avoid: conflating synthetic versus real response origin with correct versus incorrect rubric labels
treating generated target labels as independently validated correctness labels
generalizing across item types, grade levels, domains, or model generations without support
claiming automated scorer validity from synthetic-response realism alone

synthesis_matrix.title: Literature Synthesis Matrix
synthesis_matrix.description: Compare studies by generation setup, response origin, evaluation method, real-response comparator, scorer use, and reported metrics.
synthesis_matrix.empty_state: No study artifacts have been published for this literature review yet.
